race.comment: They'll go like the clappers in this. SEAMS LOGICAL (1) just missed the frame over this track and trip last time out and has since been given a bit of a freshen-up. Gets a stack of weight relief with the 3kg claim and draws favourably in gate three. Should be right there at the business end. AMERICAN CONQUEST (2) got the job done over this course and distance at the latest effort and winning rider Zechner reunites. Saves his best form for this sprint journey and rates a leading contender against this line-up. CAT CALL (6) goes well for hoop Lerena who has a win and three placings from six rides. Include from the inside alley. Former Victorian KIWI RAIDER (12) is having her first run for the Gollan camp and should be kept very safe. MISHANI EXTREME (3) next best on the back of a last-start Sunny Coast victory when resuming.
